items.q: Explain the culinary science concept: what blooming spices means.
items.a: briefly heating spices in fat to release aroma compounds
items.explanation: Core explanation: briefly heating spices in fat to release aroma compounds.

items.q: Explain the culinary science concept: purpose of reducing a sauce.
items.a: concentrate flavor and thicken via evaporation
items.explanation: Core explanation: concentrate flavor and thicken via evaporation.

items.q: Explain the culinary science concept: how acid affects ceviche.
items.a: acid denatures surface proteins similar to cooking
items.explanation: Core explanation: acid denatures surface proteins similar to cooking.

items.q: Autolyse can improve dough extensibility before kneading.
items.explanation: This aligns with common culinary science understanding.

items.q: Explain the culinary science concept: difference between roasting and braising.
items.a: roasting uses dry heat; braising combines sear and moist heat
items.explanation: Core explanation: roasting uses dry heat; braising combines sear and moist heat.

items.q: Explain the culinary science concept: why salt brining helps meat.
items.explanation: Core explanation: improves moisture retention and seasoning.

items.q: In food science, what best defines 'smoke point meaning'?
items.a: temperature at which fat begins to visibly smoke and degrade
options: temperature at which fat begins to visibly smoke and degrade
briefly heating spices in fat to release aroma compounds
measure of free water available for microbes
they are pulses high in protein and fiber
items.explanation: This concept is defined as: temperature at which fat begins to visibly smoke and degrade.

items.q: Explain the culinary science concept: water activity in food science. (set 2)
items.a: measure of free water available for microbes
items.explanation: Core explanation: measure of free water available for microbes.

items.q: Explain the culinary science concept: why rest batter for pancakes.
items.a: allows flour hydration and improves texture
items.explanation: Core explanation: allows flour hydration and improves texture.

items.q: Water activity is the same thing as moisture percentage.
items.explanation: This aligns with common culinary science understanding.
